tasks.title: Define ServiceConfig type alias in types/index.ts
tasks.description:
In packages/service-core/src/types/index.ts (line 22-24), rename the existing ServiceContext type to ServiceConfig. This type is only used for constructor configuration (carries optional logger). Add JSDoc explaining it is the constructor config, not the runtime context. Shape is identical to the old ServiceContext: { logger?: ServiceLogger }. This is a pure type rename — no runtime changes.

Test requirements:
- No dedicated test file for this task (pure type, verified by pnpm typecheck passing after T-003/T-004)

subtasks.title: Rename ServiceContext → ServiceConfig in types/index.ts
Add JSDoc clarifying ServiceConfig is for constructor config only

Define ServiceContext<THookState> interface extending QueryContext
Export ServiceConfig and ServiceContext from types/index.ts

tasks.title: Update BaseService, BaseCrudService, BaseCrudPermissions, BaseCrudRelatedService constructors to ServiceConfig
tasks.description:
Update the 4 base class constructors to use ServiceConfig instead of the renamed ServiceContext:

1. packages/service-core/src/base/base.service.ts line 25: `constructor(ctx: ServiceContext, entityName: string)` → `constructor(config: ServiceConfig, entityName: string)`. Update the body: `this.logger = config.logger ?? serviceLogger`
2. packages/service-core/src/base/base.crud.service.ts line 111: update constructor param to `config: ServiceConfig` and `super(config, entityName)`
3. packages/service-core/src/base/base.crud.permissions.ts line 65-68: update constructor param to `config: ServiceConfig`
4. packages/service-core/src/base/base.crud.related.service.ts line 35: update constructor param to `config: ServiceConfig`

Update all imports in these files from ServiceContext to ServiceConfig for the constructor param type.

Test requirements:
- pnpm typecheck passes in packages/service-core

Update base.crud.service.ts constructor param

Update base.crud.related.service.ts constructor param

tasks.title: Search-and-replace ServiceContext → ServiceConfig in all 21 concrete services and API callers
tasks.description:
Mechanical find-and-replace across approximately 30-40 files. This MUST be done as a single atomic commit.

Target files:
1. All 21 concrete services in packages/service-core/src/services/*/*.service.ts that import ServiceContext for constructor typing
2. All callers in apps/api/ that construct services with { logger } or {}
3. Any test files in packages/service-core/test/ that reference ServiceContext as a constructor param type

Do NOT replace occurrences where ServiceContext is used as the runtime context type (this will be introduced in later tasks). Only replace the constructor parameter type: `ServiceContext` → `ServiceConfig`.

Command to find files: grep -rn 'ServiceContext' packages/service-core/src/services/ apps/api/src/

After replacement, run pnpm typecheck to confirm zero errors.

Test requirements:
- pnpm typecheck passes across all packages after replacement

Run pnpm typecheck and fix any remaining type errors

tasks.title: Add idle_in_transaction_session_timeout to PostgreSQL Pool config
tasks.description:
Add the session-level idle_in_transaction_session_timeout safety net to the PostgreSQL Pool constructor in packages/db/src/client.ts.

This catches transactions that escape withServiceTransaction's SET LOCAL guard (direct withTransaction callers, etc.).

In the Pool constructor options (find the existing Pool instantiation), add:
```typescript
idle_in_transaction_session_timeout: 30000  // 30s, matches withServiceTransaction default
```

This is a connection-level option, not a query option. It must go in the pool config object passed to `new Pool({...})`.

Test requirements:
- No automated test — verify via pnpm typecheck that the Pool accepts this option
- Document in a code comment that this is a safety net for the transaction timeout

subtasks.title: Locate Pool constructor in packages/db/src/client.ts
Add idle_in_transaction_session_timeout: 30000 to Pool options
Add comment explaining this is a safety net for transaction timeouts

Fix Branch 3 catch: rethrow wrapped ServiceError when ctx?.tx is truthy
Verify Branch 2 (DbError) is unchanged

tasks.title: Add _ctx: ServiceContext to all 20 lifecycle hook signatures in base.crud.hooks.ts
tasks.description:
File: packages/service-core/src/base/base.crud.hooks.ts

Add `_ctx: ServiceContext` as the LAST parameter to all 20 default no-op hook implementations. The default implementations simply ignore the ctx. This establishes the contract for concrete service overrides.

Complete list (all 20 hooks with new signatures — see spec Section 4 table):
1. _beforeCreate(data, _actor, _ctx)
2. _afterCreate(entity, _actor, _ctx)
3. _beforeUpdate(data, _actor, _ctx)
4. _afterUpdate(entity, _actor, _ctx)
5. _beforeGetByField(field, value, _actor, _ctx)
6. _afterGetByField(entity, _actor, _ctx)
7. _beforeList(options, _actor, _ctx)
8. _afterList(result, _actor, _ctx)
9. _beforeSoftDelete(id, _actor, _ctx)
10. _afterSoftDelete(result, _actor, _ctx)
11. _beforeHardDelete(id, _actor, _ctx)
12. _afterHardDelete(result, _actor, _ctx)
13. _beforeRestore(id, _actor, _ctx)
14. _afterRestore(result, _actor, _ctx)
15. _beforeSearch(params, _actor, _ctx)
16. _afterSearch(result, _actor, _ctx)
17. _beforeCount(params, _actor, _ctx)
18. _afterCount(result, _actor, _ctx)
19. _beforeUpdateVisibility(_entity, newVisibility, _actor, _ctx)
20. _afterUpdateVisibility(entity, _actor, _ctx)

IMPORTANT: Prefix the parameter `_ctx` (underscore) in no-op implementations since it's unused. Concrete overrides may use `ctx` without underscore.

Test requirements:
- Verified by pnpm typecheck after T-010/T-011/T-012 pass the ctx parameter

subtasks.title: Add _ctx to _before* hooks (create, update, getByField, list, softDelete, hardDelete, restore, search, count, updateVisibility)
Add _ctx to _after* hooks (create, update, getByField, list, softDelete, hardDelete, restore, search, count, updateVisibility)
Verify all 20 hooks use _ctx prefix (underscore) since no-ops ignore it

tasks.title: Add ctx to BaseCrudRead methods and _executeAdminSearch
tasks.description:
File: packages/service-core/src/base/base.crud.read.ts

Add optional `ctx?: ServiceContext` as the LAST parameter to all 8 public read methods plus _executeAdminSearch.

For each method:
1. Add `ctx?: ServiceContext` as last param
2. Add ctx initialization at top of method body: `const resolvedCtx: ServiceContext = { hookState: {}, ...ctx };`
3. Pass resolvedCtx through runWithLoggingAndValidation (add `ctx: resolvedCtx` to the options object)
4. Pass execCtx to all hook calls inside the execute callback

Methods to update:
- getByField(actor, field, value, ctx?)
- getById(actor, id, ctx?)
- getBySlug(actor, slug, ctx?)
- getByName(actor, name, ctx?)
- list(actor, options?, ctx?)
- search(actor, params, ctx?)
- adminList(actor, params, ctx?)
- count(actor, params, ctx?)

For _executeAdminSearch: add `ctx: ServiceContext` as a SEPARATE second parameter (NOT inside AdminSearchExecuteParams). The method signature becomes: `protected async _executeAdminSearch(params: AdminSearchExecuteParams, ctx: ServiceContext)`

For adminList: build AdminSearchExecuteParams and call `this._executeAdminSearch(searchParams, execCtx)`.

Note: ctx is threaded for hookState only in Phase 3. ctx.tx is NOT passed to model calls yet (Phase 4).

Test requirements:
- T-031 covers backward compat (calling without ctx)
- T-032 covers hookState initialization edge case

subtasks.title: Add ctx to getByField, getById, getBySlug, getByName with resolvedCtx initialization
Add ctx to list, search, count with resolvedCtx initialization
Add ctx to adminList with resolvedCtx initialization; pass execCtx to _executeAdminSearch
Update _executeAdminSearch signature: add ctx: ServiceContext as second param
Pass execCtx to all hook calls inside execute callbacks

tasks.title: Add ctx to BaseCrudWrite methods and _getAndValidateEntity
tasks.description:
File: packages/service-core/src/base/base.crud.write.ts

Add optional `ctx?: ServiceContext` as the LAST parameter to all 7 public write methods plus _getAndValidateEntity.

For each method:
1. Add `ctx?: ServiceContext` as last param
2. Add ctx initialization: `const resolvedCtx: ServiceContext = { hookState: {}, ...ctx };`
3. Pass resolvedCtx through runWithLoggingAndValidation
4. Pass execCtx to all hook calls inside execute callback
5. Pass execCtx to _getAndValidateEntity calls (6 locations)

Methods: create, update, softDelete, hardDelete, restore, updateVisibility, setFeaturedStatus

For _getAndValidateEntity (base.service.ts:137):
- Add `ctx?: ServiceContext` as last param
- Update the TModel constraint: `TModel extends { findById: (id: string, tx?: DrizzleClient) => Promise<TEntity | null> }`
- Phase 3 comment: `const entityOrNull = await model.findById(id); // Phase 4: pass ctx?.tx`

All 6 call sites in base.crud.write.ts must pass execCtx:
```typescript
const entity = await this._getAndValidateEntity(
  this.model, id, validActor, this.entityName,
  this._canSoftDelete.bind(this),
  execCtx  // <-- NEW
);
```

Test requirements:
- T-031 covers backward compat
- T-032 covers hookState init with ctx.tx but no hookState

subtasks.title: Add ctx to create, update with resolvedCtx init and hook threading
Add ctx to softDelete, hardDelete, restore with resolvedCtx init and hook threading
Add ctx to updateVisibility, setFeaturedStatus
Update _getAndValidateEntity signature with ctx? and updated TModel constraint
Update all 6 _getAndValidateEntity call sites to pass execCtx

- `abstract _executeCount(params: z.infer<TSearchSchema>, actor: Actor, ctx: ServiceContext): Promise<{ count: number }>`

tasks.description:
Two services with special requirements:

**UserService** (packages/service-core/src/services/user/user.service.ts):
- Override _executeSearch/_executeCount: add ctx as last param
- Override _beforeCreate (slug generation): add _ctx: ServiceContext as last param
- Override _beforeUpdate (normalization): add _ctx: ServiceContext as last param
- These hooks are stateless (no mutable state), so just signature update

**ExchangeRateService** (packages/service-core/src/services/exchange-rate/exchange-rate.service.ts):
- Override _executeSearch/_executeCount: add ctx as last param
- 4 custom public methods need ctx as last optional param:
  - getLatestRate(actor, params, ctx?): ServiceOutput
  - getLatestRates(actor, ctx?): ServiceOutput
  - createManualOverride(actor, data, ctx?): ServiceOutput
  - removeManualOverride(actor, params, ctx?): ServiceOutput
- Phase 3 note: ctx.tx is NOT passed to model calls yet. Just add the parameter for future Phase 4 use.

Test requirements:
- pnpm typecheck confirms correct signatures
- No new test files needed (covered by T-031 backward compat)

tasks.title: Migrate DestinationService: create DestinationHookState and replace 4 mutable fields
tasks.description:
The most complex service migration. File: packages/service-core/src/services/destination/destination.service.ts

1. Create packages/service-core/src/services/destination/destination.types.ts:
```typescript
export interface DestinationHookState {
  updateId?: string;
  pendingPathUpdate?: { parentId: string; oldPath: string; newPath: string };
  deletedDestinationSlug?: string;
  restoredDestinationSlug?: string;
}
```

2. Delete 4 private mutable instance fields: _updateId, _pendingPathUpdate, _lastDeletedDestinationSlug, _lastRestoredDestinationSlug

3. Update _beforeUpdate hook:
- Signature: _beforeUpdate(data, _actor, ctx: ServiceContext<DestinationHookState>)
- Replace `this._updateId` reads with `ctx.hookState?.updateId`
- Replace `this._pendingPathUpdate` writes with `ctx.hookState!.pendingPathUpdate = ...`

4. Update _beforeSoftDelete, _beforeHardDelete:
- Add ctx param, write to ctx.hookState!.deletedDestinationSlug

5. Update _afterSoftDelete, _afterHardDelete:
- Add ctx param, read from ctx.hookState?.deletedDestinationSlug

6. Update _beforeRestore:
- Add ctx param, write to ctx.hookState!.restoredDestinationSlug

7. Update _afterRestore:
- Add ctx param, read from ctx.hookState?.restoredDestinationSlug

Phase 3 note: model.findById calls inside hooks still use global db (no ctx.tx yet). Add TODO comment: // Phase 4: pass ctx.tx to model.findById

Test requirements:
- T-030 covers DestinationService hookState: updateId and pendingPathUpdate stored on ctx
- T-029 covers concurrency isolation tests

Update _afterSoftDelete, _afterHardDelete to read ctx.hookState?.deletedDestinationSlug
Update _beforeRestore, _afterRestore to use ctx.hookState.restoredDestinationSlug

tasks.title: Phase 4: AccommodationReviewService — propagate ctx.tx to stats recalculation model calls
tasks.description:
⚠ EXTERNAL DEPENDENCY: Requires SPEC-060 model-layer tx support (accommodation model must accept tx parameter in update/stats methods).

File: packages/service-core/src/services/accommodationReview/accommodationReview.service.ts

Update these 4 hooks to propagate ctx.tx to accommodationModel calls:
1. _afterCreate — stats recalculation
2. _afterUpdate — stats recalculation
3. _afterSoftDelete — stats recalculation
4. _afterRestore — stats recalculation

Pattern for each:
```typescript
// BEFORE
await this.accommodationModel.updateStats(accommodationId, newStats);

// AFTER
await this.accommodationModel.updateStats(accommodationId, newStats, ctx?.tx);
```

This ensures review creation/deletion within a transaction keeps stats in the same atomic operation.

Test requirements:
- Integration test: create review inside withServiceTransaction → stats update in same tx
- Integration test: delete review inside withServiceTransaction → stats rollback on error

Update _afterSoftDelete hook to pass ctx?.tx to stats recalculation
Update _afterRestore hook to pass ctx?.tx to stats recalculation

tasks.title: Write unit tests for withServiceTransaction (commit, rollback, timeout guard)
tasks.description:
Create packages/service-core/test/utils/transaction.test.ts

Test cases (from spec Section Testing Strategy):

1. 'should commit when function succeeds':
   - Call withServiceTransaction with fn that returns 'success'
   - Assert ctx.tx is defined, ctx.hookState is {}
   - Assert result is 'success'

2. 'should rollback when function throws':
   - withServiceTransaction with fn that throws Error('deliberate failure')
   - Assert rejects with 'deliberate failure'

3. 'should pass baseCtx through to fn':
   - Call with baseCtx = { hookState: { existing: true } }
   - Assert ctx.hookState.existing === true inside fn

4. 'should use custom timeout when provided':
   - Mock tx.execute to capture SQL
   - Call with options: { timeoutMs: 5000 }
   - Assert SET LOCAL statement_timeout = 5000 was executed

5. 'should use 30000 default timeout when not provided':
   - Same but without options
   - Assert SET LOCAL statement_timeout = 30000

6. 'should use sql.raw for timeout value (not parameterized)':
   - Verify the SQL contains the timeout as a literal, not $1

Note: For rollback test, use Vitest mocking — may need real DB or mock withTransaction.

Test file: packages/service-core/test/utils/transaction.test.ts

subtasks.title: Create test file packages/service-core/test/utils/transaction.test.ts
Test: commits on success, returns fn result
Test: rejects on throw (rollback trigger)
Test: baseCtx is merged into ctx
Test: custom timeoutMs is used in SET LOCAL statement
Test: default 30000 timeout when options not provided

tasks.title: Write unit tests for runWithLoggingAndValidation tx error-rethrow behavior
tasks.description:
Create or extend packages/service-core/test/base/base.service.test.ts

Test cases (spec Testing Strategy #2 and #7):

1. 'should rethrow ServiceError when ctx.tx is present':
   - Create service with mocked model
   - Call inside withServiceTransaction with invalid data
   - Assert rejects (ServiceError propagates, triggers rollback)

2. 'should return { error } when ctx.tx is absent (backward compat)':
   - Call service.create with invalid data and NO ctx
   - Assert result.error is defined
   - Assert NO throw

3. 'should rethrow unknown errors when ctx.tx is present':
   - Mock model.create to throw TypeError (not ServiceError, not DbError)
   - Call inside withServiceTransaction
   - Assert rejects with wrapped ServiceError

4. 'should return { error } for unknown errors when no tx':
   - Same mock but NO ctx
   - Assert result.error.code === ServiceErrorCode.INTERNAL_ERROR
   - Assert NO throw

5. 'should always rethrow DbError regardless of tx':
   - Mock model to throw a DbError
   - Call with AND without ctx
   - Assert BOTH cases throw

Test file: packages/service-core/test/base/base.service.test.ts

subtasks.title: Test: ServiceError rethrows when ctx.tx present
Test: ServiceError returns { error } when no ctx.tx (backward compat)
Test: unknown error wrapped and rethrown inside tx
Test: unknown error wrapped and returned (no throw) outside tx
Test: DbError always rethrows regardless of tx

tasks.title: Write unit tests for hookState concurrency isolation — AccommodationService
tasks.description:
Create packages/service-core/test/services/accommodation/accommodation.hookstate.test.ts

Test cases (spec Testing Strategy #1):

1. 'should not leak state between concurrent softDelete calls':
   - Create AccommodationService with mocked model
   - Mock model.findById to return entity1 for '1', entity2 for '2'
   - Track revalidation calls (mock revalidation service/function)
   - Execute Promise.all([service.softDelete(actor, '1'), service.softDelete(actor, '2')])
   - Assert revalidationCalls contains 'hotel-a' and 'hotel-b' (exactly 2 calls)
   - Assert each call targets the CORRECT entity

2. 'should not leak state between concurrent restore calls':
   - Same pattern but with restore

3. 'instance fields _lastDeletedEntity and _lastRestoredAccommodation should not exist':
   - Assert `(service as any)._lastDeletedEntity === undefined`
   - Assert `(service as any)._lastRestoredAccommodation === undefined`

Note: These tests demonstrate that the old singleton mutation bug is fixed. Previously, concurrent requests could cause entity1 to trigger entity2's revalidation.

Test file: packages/service-core/test/services/accommodation/accommodation.hookstate.test.ts

subtasks.title: Create accommodation.hookstate.test.ts
Test: concurrent softDelete calls revalidate correct entities (no state leak)
Test: concurrent restore calls revalidate correct entities
Test: verify instance fields no longer exist (type safety proof)

tasks.title: Write unit tests for DestinationService hookState (updateId and pendingPathUpdate)
tasks.description:
Create packages/service-core/test/services/destination/destination.hookstate.test.ts

Test cases (spec Testing Strategy #4):

1. 'should store updateId on ctx.hookState, not instance field':
   - Mock model.findById and model.update
   - Call service.update(actor, 'dest-id', data, ctx) with ctx = { hookState: {} }
   - Assert (service as any)._updateId === undefined (field no longer exists)
   - Assert (service as any)._pendingPathUpdate === undefined

2. 'should execute path cascade when pendingPathUpdate is set':
   - Mock _beforeUpdate to set ctx.hookState.pendingPathUpdate
   - Mock model.updateDescendantPaths
   - Call service.update()
   - Assert model.updateDescendantPaths was called with correct args

3. 'should clear hookState in finally block':
   - After update completes (success or error)
   - Assert ctx.hookState.updateId === undefined
   - Assert ctx.hookState.pendingPathUpdate === undefined

4. 'should not cascade when pendingPathUpdate is not set':
   - Mock _beforeUpdate to NOT set pendingPathUpdate
   - Call update
   - Assert model.updateDescendantPaths was NOT called

Test file: packages/service-core/test/services/destination/destination.hookstate.test.ts

tasks.title: Write unit tests for hookState initialization edge cases
tasks.description:
Create packages/service-core/test/base/hookstate-init.test.ts

Test cases (spec Testing Strategy #6):

1. 'should initialize hookState when ctx is provided without hookState':
   - Create ctx = { tx: mockTx } (no hookState)
   - Mock model.findById and model.softDelete
   - Call service.softDelete(actor, 'id', ctx)
   - Assert NO crash (hookState initialized via spread: { hookState: {}, ...ctx })
   - Assert result.data is defined

2. 'should preserve existing hookState when provided':
   - Create ctx = { hookState: { customKey: 'value' } }
   - Call any service method with this ctx
   - Assert ctx.hookState.customKey is still 'value' after call

3. 'should create fresh hookState when ctx is undefined':
   - Call any service method without ctx
   - Method must internally create { hookState: {} } without crashing

4. 'resolvedCtx spread pattern: { hookState: {}, ...ctx } behavior':
   - ctx with hookState: preserves existing hookState object
   - ctx without hookState: adds empty {}
   - ctx = undefined: defaults to { hookState: {} }

Test file: packages/service-core/test/base/hookstate-init.test.ts

subtasks.title: Create hookstate-init.test.ts
Test: ctx with tx but no hookState — no crash, hookState initialized
Test: existing hookState is preserved through service call
Test: undefined ctx defaults to { hookState: {} }
